option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.shape.Rectangle?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="com.restaurant.gui.RestaurantController" stylesheets="@style.css" prefHeight="850.0" prefWidth="1280.0">
<top> <VBox> <MenuBar> <menus> <Menu text="Sistem"> <items> <MenuItem text="Refresh Date" onAction="#handleRefreshData"/> <SeparatorMenuItem/> <MenuItem text="Ieșire" onAction="#handleExit"/> </items> </Menu> <Menu text="Ajutor"> <items> <MenuItem text="Despre" onAction="#handleAbout"/> </items> </Menu> </menus> </MenuBar> <HBox spacing="20" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="header-bar"> <Label text="RESTO" style="-fx-font-size: 20px; -fx-font-weight: 900; -fx-text-fill: #007bff;"/> <Label text="PRO" style="-fx-font-size: 20px; -fx-font-weight: 900; -fx-text-fill: #34495e; -fx-translate-x: -18;"/> <Separator orientation="VERTICAL" style="-fx-padding: 0 10;"/> <Label text="Dashboard de Gestiune" style="-fx-text-fill: #6c757d; -fx-font-size: 14px;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Deconectare ↩" onAction="#handleLogout" styleClass="button-danger"/> </HBox> </VBox> </top>
<left> <!-- Removed MenuItem sidebar as requested --> </left>
<center> <VBox spacing="25" style="-fx-padding: 25;"> <TabPane fx:id="mainTabPane" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" tabClosingPolicy="UNAVAILABLE"> <tabs> <Tab text="RESTAURANT (SĂLI)"> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-background-insets: 0;"> <FlowPane fx:id="tablesPane" hgap="25" vgap="25" style="-fx-padding: 20;"/> </ScrollPane> </Tab> <Tab text="TERASĂ"> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-background-insets: 0;"> <FlowPane fx:id="terracePane" hgap="25" vgap="25" style="-fx-padding: 20;"/> </ScrollPane> </Tab> <Tab fx:id="kitchenTab" text="BUCĂTĂRIE (ADMIN)"> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color: transparent;"> <VBox spacing="20" styleClass="card" style="-fx-margin: 20 0 0 0;"> <Label text="COMENZI ACTIVE ÎN PREG‚TIRE" style="-fx-font-size: 18px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <VBox fx:id="kitchenBox" spacing="15" style="-fx-padding: 10;"/> <ListView fx:id="kitchenOrdersList" VBox.vgrow="NEVER" prefHeight="100" /> </VBox> </ScrollPane> </Tab> </tabs> </TabPane>
<!-- Bottom Tools --> <HBox fx:id="staffManagementBox" spacing="20" prefHeight="200"> <VBox spacing="10" prefWidth="420" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-padding: 20; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-border-color: #dcdde1; -fx-border-radius: 10;"> <Label text="STAFF MANAGEMENT" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #34495e;"/> <GridPane hgap="10" vgap="12"> <Label text="Full Name:" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <TextField fx:id="employeeNameField" promptText="e.g. John Doe" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1" prefWidth="200"/> <Label text="Assigned Role:" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <ComboBox fx:id="employeeRoleCombo" prefWidth="200" promptText="Select Role" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1"/> <Label text="Personal PIN:" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <TextField fx:id="employeePinField" promptText="e.g. 1234" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="1" prefWidth="200"/> <Button text="REGISTER STAFF" onAction="#handleSaveEmployee" style="-fx-background-color: #3498db; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-weight: bold;" GridPane.rowIndex="3" GridPane.columnIndex="1"/> </GridPane> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-background-color: #2f3640; -fx-padding: 10; -fx-background-radius: 10;"> <Label text="SYSTEM LOG" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #dcdde1; -fx-font-size: 11px;"/> <TextArea fx:id="logArea" editable="false" wrapText="true" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-control-inner-background: #2f3640; -fx-text-fill: #f5f6fa; -fx-font-family: 'Consolas';"/> </VBox> </HBox> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.shape.Rectangle?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="com.restaurant.gui.RestaurantController" stylesheets="@style.css" prefHeight="850.0" prefWidth="1280.0">
<top> <VBox> <MenuBar> <menus> <Menu text="Sistem"> <items> <MenuItem text="Refresh Date" onAction="#handleRefreshData"/> <SeparatorMenuItem/> <MenuItem text="Ieșire" onAction="#handleExit"/> </items> </Menu> <Menu text="Ajutor"> <items> <MenuItem text="Despre" onAction="#handleAbout"/> </items> </Menu> </menus> </MenuBar> <HBox spacing="20" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="header-bar"> <Label text="RESTO" style="-fx-font-size: 20px; -fx-font-weight: 900; -fx-text-fill: #007bff;"/> <Label text="PRO" style="-fx-font-size: 20px; -fx-font-weight: 900; -fx-text-fill: #34495e; -fx-translate-x: -18;"/> <Separator orientation="VERTICAL" style="-fx-padding: 0 10;"/> <Label text="Dashboard de Gestiune" style="-fx-text-fill: #6c757d; -fx-font-size: 14px;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Deconectare ↩" onAction="#handleLogout" styleClass="button-danger"/> </HBox> </VBox> </top>
<left> <!-- Removed MenuItem sidebar as requested --> </left>
<center> <VBox spacing="25" style="-fx-padding: 25;"> <TabPane fx:id="mainTabPane" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" tabClosingPolicy="UNAVAILABLE"> <tabs> <Tab text="RESTAURANT (SĂLI)"> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-background-insets: 0;"> <FlowPane fx:id="tablesPane" hgap="25" vgap="25" style="-fx-padding: 20;"/> </ScrollPane> </Tab> <Tab text="TERASĂ"> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-background-insets: 0;"> <FlowPane fx:id="terracePane" hgap="25" vgap="25" style="-fx-padding: 20;"/> </ScrollPane> </Tab> <Tab fx:id="kitchenTab" text="BUCĂTĂRIE (ADMIN)"> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color: transparent;"> <VBox spacing="20" styleClass="card" style="-fx-margin: 20 0 0 0;"> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10"> <Label text="COMENZI ACTIVE ÎN PREGĂTIRE" style="-fx-font-size: 18px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="REFRESH COMENZI" onAction="#handleRefreshData" style="-fx-background-color: #3498db; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 12px;"/> </HBox> <VBox fx:id="kitchenBox" spacing="15" style="-fx-padding: 10;"> <!-- Aici vor apărea chenarele cu comenzi active --> </VBox> <Separator/> <Label text="LOG ACTIVITATE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #666;"/> <ListView fx:id="kitchenOrdersList" VBox.vgrow="NEVER" prefHeight="100" /> </VBox> </ScrollPane> </Tab> </tabs> </TabPane>
<!-- Bottom Tools --> <HBox fx:id="staffManagementBox" spacing="20" prefHeight="200"> <VBox spacing="10" prefWidth="420" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-padding: 20; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-border-color: #dcdde1; -fx-border-radius: 10;"> <Label text="STAFF MANAGEMENT" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #34495e;"/> <GridPane hgap="10" vgap="12"> <Label text="Full Name:" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <TextField fx:id="employeeNameField" promptText="e.g. John Doe" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1" prefWidth="200"/> <Label text="Assigned Role:" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <ComboBox fx:id="employeeRoleCombo" prefWidth="200" promptText="Select Role" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1"/> <Label text="Personal PIN:" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <TextField fx:id="employeePinField" promptText="e.g. 1234" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="1" prefWidth="200"/> <Button text="REGISTER STAFF" onAction="#handleSaveEmployee" style="-fx-background-color: #3498db; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-weight: bold;" GridPane.rowIndex="3" GridPane.columnIndex="1"/> </GridPane> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-background-color: #2f3640; -fx-padding: 10; -fx-background-radius: 10;"> <Label text="SYSTEM LOG" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #dcdde1; -fx-font-size: 11px;"/> <TextArea fx:id="logArea" editable="false" wrapText="true" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-control-inner-background: #2f3640; -fx-text-fill: #f5f6fa; -fx-font-family: 'Consolas';"/> </VBox> </HBox> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane>
